title: Welcome to Focus Consulting
content: Welcome to Focus Consulting. Mission: Build modern digital services that reduce friction, simplify complex policy, and can be sustained by the agency. Equal employment opportunity. Open door policy. Employment at will. Leadership team: Ant Addis CEO, Michael Kalish CTO, Phedra Arthur Chief Delivery Officer, Lowell Wood Head of Engineering, Meg Greenberg Business Operations Lead. Americans with Disabilities Act accommodations.

title: Onboarding
content: Onboarding at Focus. Structured 2-3 month onboarding plan. First week orientation, tools setup, meet your team. First 30 days understanding project context, building relationships. 30-90 days contributing independently. Introductory period 90 days. Employment records, personal information, tax withholding, benefits eligibility.

title: Communication & Availability
content: Communication norms. Slack primary internal communication. Email for formal client communication. Status updates. Availability and time management. Core collaboration hours Eastern Time. Remote first company. Meeting norms video recommended. Delivery approach four pillars engineering product design project program. Virtual meetings policy. Productivity impact protocol burnout illness family matters.

title: Management & Mentorship
content: Management philosophy lean management. Organizational structure hybrid matrix. Portfolio leads own performance reviews P&L. Practice leads own frameworks hiring standards career development. Project leads own day-to-day delivery. Senior mentors provide career guidance. Mentorship async check-ins. Evaluation colleague feedback project artifacts. 12 months to align with company values.

title: Employment Categories & Policies
content: Employee categories regular full-time part-time short-term contract. Introductory period 90 days. Nursing parents policy breast milk expression. Pregnancy and childbirth accommodations Pregnant Workers Fairness Act. Progressive discipline verbal warning written warning probation suspension termination. Hiring relatives significant others. References employment verification.

title: Performance & Expectations
content: Core expectations working norms communication standards delivery approach. Performance reviews annual reviews quarterly check-ins. Coaching triggers lack of visible progress missing status updates unexcused meeting absences chronic lateness unreachable without notification. Productivity impact protocol illness burnout family matters. Timekeeping attendance billable hours time tracking.

title: Compensation & Growth
content: Payroll monthly compensation direct deposit overtime. Discretionary bonus policy based on measurable outcomes. Business development contributions organic growth delivery excellence contributions to hiring recruiting. Bonus eligibility W2 employees 4 months by December 31. Bonus pool based on company revenues profit payout January. Company level outcomes builds our brand wins new business helps us scale. Raises annual review quarterly check-ins years of experience YOE 18 months tenure LCAT availability career ladder. Promotions mid-level senior staff principal director. Referral bonus 1500 dollars hire 1500 dollars 6 months. Professional development 1000 dollars per year upskilling.

title: Benefits
content: Health insurance CareFirst DC Health Link 59 plans local 23 national. Dental insurance Beam 21 26 monthly PPO. Vision insurance Beam 4 28 monthly. Life insurance AD&D 200000 benefit Principal. Short term long term disability 60 percent. 401k 3 percent auto enrollment pre-tax Roth. FSA 3200 per year 640 rollover. DCAP 5000 per year dependent care. Professional development 1000 per year continuing education certifications conferences.

title: Time Off & Leave
content: PTO 15 days 120 hours per year no carryover. Unlimited sick leave documentation after 3 days. Paid holidays New Year MLK Presidents Day Memorial Day Juneteenth Independence Day Labor Day Veterans Day Thanksgiving Christmas. FMLA 12 weeks unpaid leave 12 months employment 1250 hours. Military leave USERRA. Jury duty. Unpaid leave of absence.

title: Conduct & Ethics
content: Professional conduct ethics honesty integrity. Non-harassment non-discrimination policy protected characteristics race sex gender identity sexual orientation. Sexual harassment policy. Reporting to management or People Operations. Workplace violence prevention zero tolerance. Drug-free workplace. Conflict of interest disclosure. Confidential company client information. Health and safety. No solicitation no distribution.

title: Technology & Remote Work
content: Computer communication systems acceptable use. Personal devices business use. Social media policy confidentiality. Client data protection VPN security clearances. Workplace searches company property. Travel expense policy reimbursable expenses airfare hotel transportation meals mileage. Non-reimbursable expenses.

title: Contractor Policies
content: Contractor engagement overview 1099 contractors. Contract-to-hire process 90 days conversion W2 full-time benefits. Billing invoicing detailed invoices hours worked expenses. Client communication standards. Consulting external work non-compete conflicts of interest. What applies to contractors onboarding how we work performance conduct ethics technology.

Military family leave deployment. Flexible leave vacation sick bereavement. Meal rest periods retail employees. Bone marrow organ donation leave. Baltimore lactation accommodations. Montgomery County sick safe leave.

title: Florida State Policies
content: Florida no state mandated paid sick leave. Florida Civil Rights Act FCRA discrimination protections. Domestic violence leave 3 days 50 employees. Jury duty. Voting leave no state mandate early voting mail. Military leave. Minimum wage 14 dollars per hour 2026. Final paycheck federal FLSA. Workers compensation.

title: Handbook Acknowledgment
content: Handbook acknowledgment receipt understanding. Policies practices expectations. Not a contract of employment. At-will employment. Comply with all policies. Contact People Operations Meg Greenberg questions.
